rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Ensure AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Align helper declaration types with expression types for valid comparisons
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Remove generated clauses for range comparisons over non-numeric data types
Use `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;` for numeric ranges
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid
Use visible identifiers from the current scope
Prefer component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
